query:
SELECT
                    c.correction_id,
                    c.original_decision_id,
                    c.correction_type,
                    c.wrong_key,
                    c.correct_key,
                    c.correction_reason,
                    c.corrected_at
                FROM "ob-poc".research_corrections c
                JOIN "ob-poc".research_decisions d ON d.decision_id = c.original_decision_id
                WHERE d.target_entity_id = $1
                ORDER BY c.corrected_at DESC
